results.name: 1. Baseline
results.description: 10-card deck, draw 5, energy 3, no draw/energy effects

results.name: 2. Moderate draw
results.description: 10-card deck with 3× draw-1 cards; hand grows mid-DFS by ~1–2 cards

results.name: 3. High draw
results.description: 12-card deck with 4× draw-2 cards; hand can grow to 9+ cards mid-DFS

results.name: 4. High energy
results.description: 10-card deck with 3× energy-gain cards; more branches remain affordable throughout DFS

results.name: 5. High draw + energy (worst case)
results.description: 12-card deck with cards that both draw AND generate energy; multiplicative branching

results.name: 6. Bloodletting rush (real cards)
results.description: 3× Bloodletting (0-cost, +2 energy each) with Strikes/Bash; energy snowballs mid-turn

results.name: 7. Offering chain (real cards)
results.description: 3× Offering (0-cost, draw 3 + energy +2) — each play expands hand and unlocks more plays

results.name: 8. Offering+ chain (real cards)
results.description: 3× Offering+ (0-cost, draw 5 + energy +2) — maximum hand/energy explosion

results.name: 9. Burning Pact (exhaust branching)
results.description: 3× Burning Pact (draw 2, exhaust 1 from hand — player choice); DFS branches per exhaust target

results.name: 10. Stacked chains (real ceiling)
results.description: 2× Offering + 2× Bloodletting + 2× Pommel Strike+: draw, energy gain, and exhaust branching combined
